---
title: GPU computing 1
subtitle: "9:30 - 16:00"
date: "11 June 2026"
author: "(SURF)"
language: 
  title-block-author-single: "Taught by"
  title-block-published: "Date"
categories:
  - HPC
image: ../img/icons8-workshop-96.png
image-alt: "data center"
execute: 
  cache: true
  freeze: true
---

### What will you learn?

Learn how to accelerate Python workloads on GPUs (Part I): Understand the fundamentals and compare the performance of scientific applications.

Prerequisites: 

- This is an intermediate level Python course.
- [Introduction to Supercomputing 1](./day-3.qmd)
- This is a two-day workshop (11 and 12 June), it is not possible to join only one day.

<a href="https://bookings.uu.nl/calendar/workshops/gpucomputing1" class="button">Register here!</a>
